description:
Tasks phase completed for a mission.

The terminal event for the planning trio. Consumers MAY treat the next
``WPCreated`` events for this mission as part of the same lamport window.

artifact_path.description: Repo-relative path to the tasks artifact (e.g. tasks.md).
artifact_path.title: Artifact Path

at.description: Wall-clock timestamp for the phase transition.
at.title: At

summary.description: Optional one-line summary of the tasks manifest.
summary.title: Summary

wp_count.description: Number of work-packages produced by the tasks phase.
wp_count.title: Wp Count

title: TasksCompletedPayload
